task_completion.description: Verify that a new Customer record has been created for 'Exotic Liquids'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screen showing the 'Customers' list with 'Exotic Liquids' present, or a completed Customer creation form for 'Exotic Liquids'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Journal Entry form has been opened and dated today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Journal Entry creation or edit screen with the 'Date' field populated with the current date.

task_completion.description: Verify that the narration 'Contra entry offset' is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Contra entry offset' visible in the 'Narration' or 'Description' field of the Journal Entry.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Journal Entry debits Accounts Payable for 'Exotic Liquids' by $200.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item in the Journal Entry with the Account set to 'Accounts Payable', the sub-account/supplier set to 'Exotic Liquids', and '200.00' in the Debit column.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Journal Entry credits Accounts Receivable for 'Exotic Liquids' by $200.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item in the Journal Entry with the Account set to 'Accounts Receivable', the sub-account/customer set to 'Exotic Liquids', and '200.00' in the Credit column.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Manager.io web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should be open to http://localhost:8080 showing the Manager.io interface, not a terminal or text editor making API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Manager.io menus (e.g., Customers, Journal Entries) and typing into the form fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script or terminal command to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts (like curl or python) to directly inject the journal entry into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is Manager.io running at http://localhost:8080. The target entity is 'Exotic Liquids'. The offset amount is exactly 200.00. The journal entry must debit 'Accounts Payable' and credit 'Accounts Receivable' for the 'Exotic Liquids' sub-accounts.
